examples.snippet:
import React from 'react';
import { Avatar } from '@salutejs/plasma-web';
export function App() {
    return (
        <>
            <Avatar
                size="l"
                name="Иван Фадеев"
                extraPlacement="top-left"
                type="counter"
                count={33}
                counterView="positive"
                hasExtra
            />
            <Avatar
                size="l"
                name="Иван Фадеев"
                extraPlacement="top-right"
                type="counter"
                count={33}
                counterView="accent"
                hasExtra
            />
            <Avatar
                size="l"
                name="Иван Фадеев"
                extraPlacement="bottom-right"
                type="badge"
                text="15"
                badgeView="warning"
                hasExtra
            />
            <Avatar
                size="l"
                name="Иван Фадеев"
                extraPlacement="bottom-left"
                type="badge"
                text="15"
                badgeView="negative"
                hasExtra
            />
        </>
    );
}
